forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers in the south in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Medium chance of showers in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to southwesterly during the morning then tending southerly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly in the morning then tending northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly 15 to 25 km/h before dawn then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the west in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 40 km/h before turning northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny day. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then tending northerly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending northerly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the day then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Cloudy. Light winds.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Sunny. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northerly 25 to 35 km/h during the day then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 27.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Sunny. Winds northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly during the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Clear. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly in the morning then tending east to northeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 32.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 31.
Mostly clear. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Nullarbor, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h tending northerly 30 to 45 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Ceduna. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 29 to 35.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds north to northeasterly 30 to 45 km/h tending north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the day then tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 23 with daytime temperatures reaching 28 to 33.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower east of Ceduna in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Clear. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h during the morning then turning northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Medium chance of showers in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly during the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny morning. High chance of showers in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h increasing to 40 km/h before turning west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Sunny day. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the far west, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the afternoon and evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Coober Pedy. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 28 to 35.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers west of Coober Pedy in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Coober Pedy in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming northerly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 35.

Slight chance of a shower in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Woomera in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 33.
Clear. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]
Sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 35.

Mostly sunny. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northeast to southeasterly during the morning then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 29 to 36.
